---
title: "analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-16"
---

```{r}
WKDir ="/Users/z5161362/OneDrive - DPIE/Documents/PhD/spatRast/"

source(paste0(WKDir,"R/cost_distance.r"))

library(APCalign)

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
#“Distances are multiplied with the friction, thus to get the cost-distance, the friction surface must express the cost per unit distance (speed) of travel”

# Workflow

setup_terra_for_large_rasters(
  tempdir = paste0(WKDir, "output/temp/"),
  memfrac = 0.6,
  verbose = TRUE
)

 cost <- load_cost_raster(paste0(WKDir,"data/processing/wol/cost.tif"))
 track <- load_tracks(paste0(WKDir,"data/tracks/tracks_clean.rds"))
 burn_tracks(cost, track, filename=paste0(WKDir,"output/burn.tif"))
 burn <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/burn.tif"))

run_cost_dist(burn, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface.tif")), tmp_fn= (paste0(WKDir,"output/temp/")), overwrite = TRUE, maxiter = 25)

#cost_surface <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface.tif"))

#cost_surface_wol <-  terra::crop(cost_surface, vect(np_wol_gda94), mask=TRUE) # run and check
#terra::writeRaster(cost_surface_wol, paste0(WKDir, "output/cost_surface_wol.tif"), overwrite = TRUE) ## Commented out to prevent re-writing
cost_surface_wol <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, "output/cost_surface_wol.tif"))

```

```{r}
# combining herb and iNat
occ_wol_comb <- rbind(occ_wol_gda94, occ_wol_herb_gda94)
occ_wol_comb <- dplyr::bind_rows(list(occ_wol_gda94, occ_wol_herb_gda94), .id = 'source') 
occ_wol_comb <- occ_wol_comb %>%
    mutate(source = recode(source, "1" = "iNaturalist", "2" = "Herbarium"))

occ_wol_cost <- pts_cost(occ_wol_comb, cost_surface_wol) # point cost
```


```{r}
occ_wol_cost <- occ_wol_cost %>% filter(uncertainty < 300) # filtering out points with more than 300m of uncertainty in location
#tax_resources <- load_taxonomic_resources() # load this first run of session
status <- native_anywhere_in_australia(as.list(occ_wol_cost$species), resources = tax_resources) # using APCalign to extract native/introduced status
occ_wol_cost <- cbind(occ_wol_cost, status$native_anywhere_in_aus)
```


```{r}
occ_wol_text <- occ_wol_cost %>% filter(pts_cost > 300) # creating a subset of labels for plotting

buff <- st_buffer(np_wol_gda94, dist = 500, nQuadSegs = 30) # 500m buffer for plotting
tr_wol <- st_intersection(wol_tr_gda94, buff) 

occ_wol_cost <- dist_points_to_path(occ_wol_cost, tr_wol) # Calculates crow distance from point to the path.

plot_cost(cost_surface=cost_surface_wol, tr=tr_wol, occ_cost=occ_wol_cost, occ_text=occ_wol_text, cell=100000000, fn=paste0(WKDir,"output/plots/cost_rast_wol.png"))
```


```{r}
grid_sf <- grid_points_cost(n=2000, np_outline=np_wol_gda94, tr=tr_wol, cost_surface=cost_surface_wol)
```


```{r}
#cost vers dist plots
# iNaturalist
introduced <- occ_wol_cost %>% filter(status.native_anywhere_in_aus == "introduced")
occ_wol_cost_inat <- occ_wol_cost %>% filter(source == "iNaturalist")
cost_v_dist_plot(grid_sf, occ_wol_cost_inat, extra=TRUE, top_layer_points = introduced, cols=c("#ABC7C9", "#666633", "#669900") , fn = paste0(WKDir,"output/plots/cost_v_dist_inat.png"))

# Herbarium
occ_wol_cost_herb <- occ_wol_cost %>% filter(source == "Herbarium")
cost_v_dist_plot(grid_sf, occ_wol_cost_herb, extra=FALSE, cols= c("#666633","#669900"), fn=paste0(WKDir,"output/plots/cost_v_dist_herb.png"))
```









```{r}
cost <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"data/processing/wol/cost.tif"))
tr_buff <- st_buffer(wol_tr_gda94, dist=30, nQuadSegs = 30)
crop_to_track <-terra::crop(cost, tr_buff, mask=TRUE, touches=TRUE)

tr_road <- tr_buff %>% filter(highway_com=="road")

setup_terra_for_large_rasters(
  tempdir = paste0("/Users/z5161362/Downloads/temp/"),
  memfrac = 0.6,
  verbose = TRUE
)

burn_tracks(crop_to_track, tr_road, filename=paste0(WKDir,"output/burn_tracks.tif"))
burn_tr <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/burn_tracks.tif"))

run_cost_dist(burn_tr, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_track.tif")), tmp_fn= ("/Users/z5161362/Downloads/temp/"), overwrite = TRUE, maxiter = 25)
cost_tr <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_track.tif"))
plot(cost_tr)
```

# Tracks plot here





```{r}
# SMALL test 

# Creating small box
bbox <- ext(150.230, 150.280, -33.190, -33.140)
bbox_vect <- as.polygons(bbox)
crs(bbox_vect) <- "EPSG:4283"  
bbox_proj <- project(bbox_vect, crs(cost))
cost_crop_sm <- crop(cost, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Cost
wol_tr_crop_sm <- st_crop(wol_tr_gda94, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Tracks
plot(cost_crop_sm)

cost_sm <- load_cost_raster(cost_crop_sm)
track_sm <- load_tracks(wol_tr_crop_sm)
burn_sm <- burn_tracks(cost_sm, track_sm, tmp_fn= (paste0(WKDir,"output/temp/")))
cost_surface_sm<- run_cost_dist(burn_sm, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_sm.tif")), overwrite=TRUE)
cost_surface_sm <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_sm.tif"))
plot_cost_with_tracks(cost_surface_sm, tracks = track_sm, filename = "output/plots/cost_rast_sm.png")

# Raster CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Tracks CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Raster dimensions: 2834 rows x 2405 cols (6,815,770 cells)
# Resolution: 2 x 2 m
# Rasterizing tracks onto cost surface...
# Track cells rasterized: 14,905 (0.22% of raster)
# Running costDist (maxiter=50)...
# costDist completed in 11.26 seconds
# Estimated peak memory: 143.9 MB
ext(cost_crop_sm)
```
